name: DroneCAN Peripheral Architecture Upgrade
description: You are a UAV Hardware Integration Engineer. A heavy-lift quadcopter has just had its legacy I2C GPS and analog power module physically replaced with modern DroneCAN (UAVCAN) equivalents. Reconfigure the autopilot's parameter tree to activate the CAN buses and route peripheral data correctly by applying the 8 parameter changes specified in the engineering work order at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dronecan_upgrade_manifest.txt. Ensure all 8 parameters are correctly set and saved to the vehicle.
